tickets.title: Login page not loading
tickets.description: Users report that the login page stays blank after submitting credentials.

tickets.title: Payment gateway timeout
tickets.description: Stripe payment process fails due to timeout during checkout.

tickets.title: Profile image upload issue
tickets.description: Customers cannot upload profile images larger than 2MB.

tickets.title: Dashboard stats incorrect
tickets.description: Sales analytics numbers do not match the database records.

tickets.title: Email notification not sent
tickets.description: Order confirmation emails are not delivered to customers.

tickets.title: Password reset link expired
tickets.description: Reset password links expire immediately after generation.

tickets.title: Search results slow
tickets.description: Product search takes more than 10 seconds to load results.

tickets.title: Mobile layout broken
tickets.description: Homepage layout overlaps on smaller screen devices.

tickets.title: Admin panel access denied
tickets.description: Admin users cannot access the management dashboard.

tickets.title: Duplicate order creation
tickets.description: System occasionally creates duplicate orders after checkout.

tickets.title: Notification badge not updating
tickets.description: Unread notification badge does not refresh automatically.

tickets.title: API returns 500 error
tickets.description: Orders API occasionally returns internal server errors.

tickets.title: Cart items disappear
tickets.description: Items added to the cart disappear after page refresh.

tickets.title: Report export not working
tickets.description: Exporting reports to CSV fails without error message.

tickets.title: Session logout issue
tickets.description: Users remain logged in even after clicking logout.
